name: text-to-gds
description: Local-first MCP tools for superconducting GDS generation, DRC, and simulation loops.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and validate superconducting GDS layouts.
interface.longDescription: Text-to-GDS packages local MCP tools and agent workflows for compiling gdsfactory PCells into GDSII, emitting semantic sidecars, running DRC-shaped checks, and executing mock or adapter-backed superconducting circuit simulations.
defaultPrompt: Create a Manhattan JJ GDS and run DRC.
Estimate JJ current from a layout sidecar.
